settings.title: Settings
settings.themeColorDesc: Sets the main accent color across the home, detail, and settings views.
settings.toggleShortcutDesc: Click Record, then press a key combo to save. Press Esc to cancel.
settings.expireDaysDesc: Auto-delete after expiry (favorites and pinned are exempt)
settings.incognitoModeDesc: Pause clipboard recording. New clipboard content will not be saved while enabled.
settings.incognitoShortcutDesc: Click Record, then press a key combo to toggle incognito mode. Press Esc to cancel.
settings.migrateCacheDesc: Move existing cache files to the new directory?
settings.restartRequired: Cache directory changed. Restart the app to apply.
settings.autoCheckUpdateDesc: Check for updates when the app starts
settings.systemNotificationsDesc: Use OS notifications for copy, paste, and other feedback
settings.buttonPositionDesc: Place window control buttons on the left or right side
settings.defaultBrowserDesc: Browser used to open URLs from clipboard entries

richText.listDesc: Control which rich text styles remain visible in the main list. Everything is off by default to keep the list clean.
richText.enableListPreview: Enable rich text preview in list
richText.enableListPreviewDesc: When disabled, the list shows plain text summaries instead of rendering source HTML.
richText.detailDesc: Choose the default rendering mode for the detail page. You can still switch modes inside the detail view.

clean.label: Clean
clean.desc: Keeps structure and font size while removing backgrounds, text colors, and font families that pollute the UI.

full.label: Full
full.desc: Preserves as much of the original rich text styling as possible for closer visual fidelity.

preserveBold.label: Preserve bold
preserveBold.desc: Show bold formatting from the source content.

preserveItalic.label: Preserve italic
preserveItalic.desc: Show italic formatting from the source content.

preserveDecoration.label: Preserve underline and strike
preserveDecoration.desc: Keep underline, strikethrough, superscript, and subscript decoration.

preserveLinks.label: Preserve links
preserveLinks.desc: Keep clickable links and link styling in the list.

preserveLists.label: Preserve lists
preserveLists.desc: Keep ordered and unordered list structure.

preserveCode.label: Preserve code styling
preserveCode.desc: Keep inline code and code block presentation.

preserveBlockquotes.label: Preserve blockquotes
preserveBlockquotes.desc: Keep blockquote structure and quote styling.

preserveFontSize.label: Preserve font size
preserveFontSize.desc: Keep source font sizes, with list-safe clamping applied.

preserveTextColor.label: Preserve text color
preserveTextColor.desc: Keep source text colors, which may reduce visual consistency.

preserveBackground.label: Preserve background
preserveBackground.desc: Keep background colors and highlights, which can make the list noisy.

preserveFontFamily.label: Preserve font family
preserveFontFamily.desc: Keep source fonts even if they do not match the app typography.

preserveTables.label: Preserve tables
preserveTables.desc: Show table structure in the list, even though wide content takes more room.

preserveImages.label: Preserve embedded images
preserveImages.desc: Show images embedded inside rich text entries, which can increase row height.

preserveLayout.label: Preserve layout styles
preserveLayout.desc: Keep spacing, alignment, and sizing styles. This is the most likely option to break list consistency.

askAi.title: AI Services
askAi.description: Select AI services to use with Ask AI. Enabled services can be opened in a WebView window.
askAi.presetDesc: Customize the operations shown in the Ask AI menu. Use {content} as placeholder for clipboard text.
askAi.presetPromptPlaceholder: Enter prompt template... use {content} for clipboard text
askAi.presetPromptHint: Use {content} for clipboard text, {customPrompt} for user input

ai.fetchModelsFailed: Failed to fetch models, please enter model name manually
ai.summaryMinLengthDesc: Only summarize text longer than this (characters)
ai.summaryMaxLengthDesc: Maximum characters for the generated summary

settingsLayout.generalDesc: Manage the app appearance, language, shortcuts, and baseline behavior.
settingsLayout.richTextDesc: Control how rich text is rendered in the list and detail views.
settingsLayout.syncDesc: Connect cloud accounts and tune sync frequency, encryption, and settings sync.
settingsLayout.translateDesc: Configure translation providers, credentials, and availability.
settingsLayout.ocrDesc: Manage OCR engines, default recognition flow, and local runtimes.
settingsLayout.dataDesc: Review clipboard stats, import or export history, and maintain cache storage.
settingsLayout.aiDesc: Choose AI providers, models, summaries, and prompt behavior.
settingsLayout.askAiDesc: Organize Ask AI services and the preset actions shown in the menu.
